case_title: DAVID H CHERRY VS. ANN M QUIQLEY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, DAVID CHERRY, APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ANN QUIQLEY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHERRY, DAVID H AS TO DEFENDANT QUIQLEY, ANN M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
